title: ActiveCampaign vs Moosend (2025): Which Is Better?
meta_description: Compare ActiveCampaign vs Moosend. See pricing, features, and which email marketing tool is right for your business.
intro: ActiveCampaign and Moosend are both popular email marketing platforms, but they serve different business needs. ActiveCampaign emphasizes advanced automation and CRM capabilities for growing businesses, while Moosend offers an affordable, beginner-friendly alternative with a free tier. This comparison will help you decide which platform best fits your marketing goals and budget.
choose_a_if: You need advanced CRM and lead scoring capabilities for complex sales funnels
You require sophisticated automation workflows and site tracking for customer behavior
You're building an ecommerce or enterprise-level email marketing operation
choose_b_if: You're starting out and want to test email marketing without paying upfront
You need unlimited emails and prefer simple, straightforward automation
You want landing pages and subscription forms as part of your core feature set

faq.a: It depends on your needs. ActiveCampaign is superior for businesses requiring advanced automation, CRM, and lead scoring capabilities. However, Moosend is better for startups and small businesses prioritizing affordability and ease of use with a free tier option.

faq.q: Which is cheaper, ActiveCampaign or Moosend?
faq.a: Moosend is more budget-friendly, offering a free plan with up to 1,000 subscribers and paid plans starting at $9/month. ActiveCampaign has no free tier and starts at $15/month, but includes more advanced features like CRM and lead scoring.

faq.q: Can I switch from Moosend to ActiveCampaign?
faq.a: Yes, both platforms support data exports and migrations. ActiveCampaign provides import tools to help you transfer your contact lists and email campaigns, though you may need to rebuild complex automation workflows manually.
